title: Day 1 Lesson 3 ( Video )Asking about things you don-t know
html:
Day 1 - Lesson 3

わからない　ものを　きく = Asking about things you don't know

ばしょ (Location): きょうしつ = Classroom

とうじょうじんぶつ (Characters): せんせい (Teacher), Student (がくせい)、しんにゅうせい (New student)

Video 1 - これ  (this)  / Affirmative & Negative

Video 2 - これ (this) / Negative

The new words you find in this lesson are:

これ (kore): this

とうきょう (Tookyoo): Tokyo

ろせんず (rosenzu): railway map

とうきょうのろせんずです (Tokyo no rosenzu des): it's a railway map for Tokyo

も (mo): also (too)

はい (hai): yes

でも (demo): but

じゃ ありません (ja arimasen): is not

おおさか (Ooska): Osaka
